description: Letter from Yosef b. Khalfa from Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. Around 1062. Regarding a large deal of pearls, which the writer has a part in. Mentions that he received fabrics. He states that although his business is wide, he cannot support himself in Alexandria, and he considers coming to Fustat to work as a tailor. In the handwriting of Yehuda (Yahya), Yosef’s brother. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #563) VMR
description_he: מכתב מיוסף בן ח'לפה, מאלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, כ-1062, על עסקת פנינים ועבודת תפירה
